projectDescription: A modern CLI tool that streamlines running efficient multi-core AFLPlusPlus fuzzing campaigns with best-practice defaults, automatic session management, coverage reporting, and a real-time TUI.
keyFeatures: Automated multi-core AFLPlusPlus campaign setup following official best-practice guidelines
Three fuzzing modes: Default, MultipleCores, and CIFuzzing
Support for SAN, CMPLOG, and CMPCOV instrumented binaries
Tmux and GNU screen session management with automatic layout creation
Real-time TUI (ratatui-based) for monitoring campaign progress — full afl-whatsup replacement
TOML-based configuration file support with per-project config auto-discovery
LLVM-based coverage collection and visualization (HTML and text reports)
Deterministic command generation via PRNG seeding
Live seed injection into running campaigns via add-seed
Shell completion scripts for bash and zsh
